daily_stop_grid.not_claimed: This is not yet a minute-by-minute intraday stop simulation.

evidence_boundary.daily_stop_grid_not_claimed: This is not yet a minute-by-minute intraday stop simulation.
evidence_boundary.fees_slippage_assumption: gross replay only: no additional fees or slippage beyond side-aware bid/ask prices
evidence_boundary.pnl_rule: P&L is emitted only when entry and fixed-minute exit long/short bid/ask quotes are present from trusted intraday OPRA/NBBO rows; long exit uses bid and short cover uses ask.
evidence_boundary.readback_is: readiness queue for building a future exact OPRA/NBBO minute-level exit replay
evidence_boundary.readback_is_not: simulated P&L, promotion proof, stop-policy approval, broker action, or a live-risk instruction
evidence_boundary.trusted_future_requirement: minute-by-minute exact-contract OPRA/NBBO bid/ask exit replay with no midpoint, daily/EOD, stale, display, or manual marks
